channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PRAXIS] Praxis Home Retail Board Meeting on May 9, 2026 for Audited Results
item.description:
Praxis Home Retail Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 9, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 11, 2026. The notice is available on the company website.

  • Praxis Home Retail board meeting set for May 9, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 11, 2026.
  • Notice available on Praxis Home Retail website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Praxis Home Retail Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IOC] Indian Oil Board to Consider FY26 Audited Results, Dividend
item.description:
Indian Oil Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board meeting on May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the declaration of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed from April 1, 2026, to May 20, 2026, for all insiders.

  • Indian Oil board meeting set for May 18, 2026, to approve audited FY26 results.
  • Board to consider declaration of final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed for insiders from April 1 to May 20, 2026.
  • Meeting will cover both standalone and consolidated financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PETRONET] Petronet LNG: FY26 Final Dividend of ₹3.00 Recommended
item.description:
Petronet LNG Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board has recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per share (on the face value of ₹10 each) for FY 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting. The record date and payment/despatch date for the dividend will be intimated in due course. The board meeting was held on May 4, 2026, commencing at 2:30 P.M. and concluding at 3:45 p.m.

  • Petronet LNG's board approved FY26 audited financial results.
  • A final dividend of ₹3.00 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • The board meeting concluded at 3:45 p.m. on May 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PETRONET LNG LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [BHEL] BHEL Q4 FY26: Revenue Up 36.9% YoY to ₹12,310 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd (BHEL) has released its Q4 FY2025-26 results, showcasing a strong performance. The company reported a 19% year-on-year growth in revenue from operations, reaching ₹33,782 crores for the full fiscal year. Key highlights include a 50% rise in order inflow in the industry segment and commissioning of 8.9 GW power capacity. BHEL also received the SCOPE Eminence Award for R&D and three Governance Now PSU Awards. Revenue from Operations for Q4FY26 stood at ₹12,310 Cr, up from ₹8,993 Cr in Q4FY25. Profit After Tax for Q4FY26 was ₹1283 Cr compared to ₹504 Cr in Q4FY25.

  • Revenue from Operations grew 19% y-o-y to ₹33,782 Crores for FY26.
  • Q4 FY26 Revenue from Operations reached ₹12,310 Cr, a significant increase from ₹8,993 Cr in Q4 FY25.
  • Profit After Tax for Q4 FY26 was ₹1283 Cr, substantially higher than ₹504 Cr in Q4 FY25.
  • Order inflow increased by 50% in the industry segment.
  • The company commissioned/synchronized ~8.9 GW of power capacity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT HEAVY ELECTRICALS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KROSS] Kross Ltd Board Meeting on May 12, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Kross Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 14, 2026, following the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 14, 2026.
  • Closure is due to the impending declaration of financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kross Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PETRONET] Petronet LNG: FY26 Results, ₹3.00 Dividend Recommended
item.description:
Petronet LNG Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors, in its meeting held on May 4, 2026, approved the results and recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per share (on the face value of ₹10 each) for the financial year 2025-26. The dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The meeting commenced at 2:30 P.M. and concluded at 3:45 p.m.

  • Petronet LNG announces audited financial results for FY26.
  • Board recommends a final dividend of ₹3.00 per share.
  • Auditors' report has an unmodified opinion.
  • Record date and payment date for the dividend will be intimated later.
  • Board meeting commenced at 2:30 P.M. and concluded at 3:45 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PETRONET LNG LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VSSL] Vardhman Special Steels: Monitoring Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Vardhman Special Steels Ltd. has released the Monitoring Agency Report by CRISIL Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 32(6) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and Regulation 162A of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The report pertains to the utilization of proceeds from the preferential issue of equity shares. The monitoring agency confirms no deviations from the stated objectives.

  • CRISIL Ratings is the monitoring agency for the preferential issue.
  • The report confirms no deviations from the objects of the issue.
  • The report is in compliance with SEBI regulations.
  • Issue size is ₹3,849,088,060.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN SPECIAL STEELS LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [HYUNDAI] Hyundai Motor India Board Meeting on May 8, 2026
item.description:
Hyundai Motor India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 8, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending the final dividend for the year ended March 31, 2026, if any. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares is closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hyundai Motor India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HLVLTD] HLV Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for May 12, 2026
item.description:
HLV Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the public announcement of the board meeting's outcome.

  • HLV Ltd's board will meet on May 12, 2026, to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • The meeting pertains to Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements).
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, reopening 48 hours post-results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HLV Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PTC] PTC India Board Meeting on May 19, 2026 to Consider Results, Dividend
item.description:
PTC India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 19, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY 2025-26. The record date for determining shareholders' eligibility for the dividend will be announced separately. The trading window for company securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are announced.

  • PTC India board to meet on May 19, 2026, for financial results.
  • Board will consider final dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility to be announced separately.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PTC INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
